game:traitdesc-mixer: Can make exclusive use of mixing bowls
game:traitdesc-dirtyapron: Food stays fresh 50% longer in crocks you seal
game:traitdesc-spinthrift: Spins flax fiber into twine more efficiently
game:traitdesc-potter: Can craft mortar, plaster, bricks and refractory bricks at lower costs
game:traitdesc-artisan: Can create exclusive decorated pottery and luxurious furniture
game:traitdesc-tanner: Exclusive craftable leather goods, and cheaper recipe for backpacks
game:traitdesc-angler: Recipe of Fishing Rod locked to Wayfarer
game:traitdesc-mason: Crafts cobblestone and drystone more efficiently; can directly make ashlar blocks from stones
game:traitdesc-machinist: Can make, install and operate helve hammers, pulverizers, chutes and other kinds of machinery
game:traitdesc-sailwright: Can make large sails, more efficient at making normal-sized sails
game:traitdesc-shipwright: Can build sailboats for efficient overseas travel
game:traitdesc-smith: Can work with advanced (Tier 2+) anvils, smith advanced tools and weaponry, and make extra arrows using bindings
game:traitdesc-distiller: Can install and work with boilers
game:traitdesc-apothecary: Can craft basic healing items more efficiently, exclusive access to advanced healing items
game:traitdesc-blackland: Can craft better soils more easily, natural grassy roofs and flails to process the grain
game:traitdesc-millwright: Crafts mechanical parts more efficiently, and can exclusively craft many advanced parts. Can craft boards more effectively
game:traitdesc-greenfingered: Can extract seeds from produce, craft rich soil and soil boosters
game:traitdesc-woodsman: Produces more firewood when chopping logs, can craft sticks from firewood
game:charattribute-produceDropRate-0.3: +30% extra produce while harvesting planted crops
game:charattribute-oreDropRate-0.2: +20% added chance to get double ore
game:characterdesc-forger: The forge never sleeps and neither do you. Iron, steel and fire have shaped your hands and your life in equal measure. Without you, there are no tools, no weapons and no armor worth wearing.
game:characterdesc-scullion: You have fed armies, settlements and starving families with whatever the land offered. A fire and a pot are all you need. While others fight over resources, you turn them into something that keeps people alive.
game:characterdesc-engineer: Gears, levers and mechanical systems are second nature to you. You understand how things move, how they break and how to make them last. A settlement without an engineer is a settlement waiting to fail.
game:characterdesc-farmhand: You were raised on soil and hard labor. Every season brings new work and the land does not wait for those who rest too long. You know crops, weather and the slow patience that farming demands.
game:characterdesc-tunnelrat: The dark underground is your home. You have spent more time beneath the earth than above it, following veins of ore through cold stone. What others fear in the depths, you have long since made peace with.
game:characterdesc-artisan: Your hands shape clay, thread and fabric into things of use and beauty. The work is slow and demanding but what you make outlasts those who made it. Fine goods and careful craft are your contribution to the world.
game:characterdesc-trapper: The wilderness is your workplace. You read tracks, set snares and move through the forest without disturbing it. Animals rarely hear you coming and that is exactly how you prefer it.
game:characterdesc-drifter: No settlement has ever held you for long. You travel light, live off the land and know how to disappear when necessary. Roads, ruins and forgotten paths are more familiar to you than any hearth.
game:characterdesc-ironback: This is not a life you chose. It is one that was chosen for you. You were appointed to stand between your settlement and whatever comes for it. You hit harder, endure more and your armor bears the marks to prove it.
toeclasses:missing-trait: You don't know how to do that.
toeclasses:missing-stitcher-trait: You don't know how repair clothes.
